title: Amine Kanoun
content:
People.ContactEmail akanoun@mccarthy.ca
- Université de Montréal
Amine Kanoun is an associate in our Business Law Group in Montréal. His practice encompasses a broad range of corporate law matters, with a particular focus on corporate finance, mergers and acquisitions, and governance matters affecting publicly listed issuers. Amine represents businesses and financial institutions on complex domestic and international transactions.
He obtained his Bachelor of Civil Law (LL.B.) from Université de Montréal in 2024, following a Bachelor of Commerce with distinction from McGill University in 2020, where he was also a member of the McGill International Review. During his academic career, Amine participated in a student exchange program at King’s College London, where he was a varsity soccer athlete.
Amine was called to the Quebec Bar in 2025.

- Brookfield and La Caisse enter into definitive arrangement agreement to acquire Boralex Inc. March 25, 2026

- Kruger Products Inc. closes its offering of senior unsecured notes December 10, 2025
- Sagard Holdings acquired all issued and outstanding shares in the capital of Unigestion Private Equity Holding SA September 23, 2025
